name: Sesame Chicken Wings
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the chicken pieces and pat dry. Place in a bowl.
2. Combine all remaining ingredients except sesame seeds in a blender and puree.
3. Pour the mixture over the chicken and stir to coat all the pieces well.
4. Refrigerate for at least 2 hours.
5. Remove the chicken from the marinade and sprinkle with sesame seeds.
6. Place under the broiler for 5 to 6 minutes on each side.
7. Serve hot.
Makes 6 to 8 servings as hors d'oeuvres.
